text: Entering this space, I am immediately drawn to the sharp angles and glass surfaces—symbols of transparency but also separations between observer and observed. The environment is sterile, almost clinical, yet the bold colors and creative displays within the 'R+D' area invite curiosity and a sense of experimentation. I feel a pull between detachment, as if viewing life through a pane, and fascination, as the promise of discovery and innovation beckons me inward. In this juxtaposition of clarity and mystery, I find myself both participant and watcher, lingering on the threshold of understanding.
